calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-08-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic Inc. is present. Represented by Richard Beal.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant Joa'quinn Welch is present.
Attorney Leila Knox appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of AUG-12-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Off Calendar
